profile_summary: OncoHealth — digital oncology management (OneUM prior-auth, Oncology Insights analytics, Iris telehealth). Holds the most sensitive PHI: cancer Dx + genomic markers + oncology mental-health notes (HIPAA/GINA). 12M+ lives; Arsenal Capital + McKesson. Demo spine: PA-packet & Iris free-text PHI leaks, context-aware-PHI-vs-naive-code precision, and coverage gaps (genomic, MRN, member IDs) + analytics re-identification.
pending: Optional: add an X12 278/837 EDI prior-auth/claims carrier (the real payer-integration format) alongside the readable CSV roster.
Optional: add a faxed-intake OCR .txt carrier (messy PHI from scanned referrals) for an OCR-recall talking point.
Confirm Slack vs Microsoft Teams for the Iris care team; swap the surface if Teams.
Consider a small Iris consumer copay/PCI layer only if they confirm patient-facing billing.

decision_log.note: Generated full POC: 7 carriers, 32 plants (17 straightforward / 7 FP near-miss / 8 FN-evasive), PHI-led. Lead = oncology PA packet + Iris free-text PHI (cancer + suicidal ideation). Scan: recall 77.8%, precision-quiet 71.4%; the 2 FPs are the intentional criteria-library over-fire (ICD10/drug) vs PHI staying quiet on the same doc; genomic_marker/mrn/insurance_member_id are not_integrated coverage gaps. Tuned generator for detector reality: dedicated Iris carrier to PROTECTED_HEALTH_INFORMATION (component detectors suppress it when co-queried), valid NPIs (start 1/2), real C-code ICD-10s, dashed vs spaced SSNs. Extended shared detectors.json: phi_note/drug_name/diagnosis_desc mappings + genomic_marker/ndc gaps.
